mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_stu_portrait_ability (ability_name, datavalue, stu_datavalue, ability_id, stu_id, classroom_id, course_id, num, import_level) VALUES
(#{item.abilityName}, #{item.dataValue}, #{item.stuDataValue},#{item.id},#{stuId},#{classroomId},#{courseId},#{num},#{item.importLevel})
